notes: This pass continued from the repo-forward seam at C3:2000 using the upgraded tiny-veneer plus caller-context workflow.
The seam produced real-looking same-bank raw caller fan-in into 20AA, 20B2, and 20E6, including low-bank C3 pressure, but those targets still fail local byte-level sanity checks and are not promoted.
2000 and 2010 also remain unstable despite visible raw hits, while 2083 stays a false-entry pocket instead of stabilizing into a clean owner/helper body.
No clean wrapper, return-stub, or other tiny executable split survives inside 2000..20FF.
After freezing the whole mixed pocket honestly, 2100 becomes the next in-order seam to investigate.
